question: How do I turn on my phone?
answer: Press and hold the Power button (usually located on the right side of the device) for a few seconds until the screen lights up and displays the manufacturer's logo.
steps: Locate the Power button on the side of your phone.
Press and hold the button for 3-5 seconds.
Release the button when the screen turns on.

question: How do I connect to Wi-Fi?
answer: You can connect to a Wi-Fi network through your phone's Settings app to access the internet without using mobile data.
steps: Swipe down from the top of your screen to open the Quick Settings panel.
Tap the 'Internet' or 'Wi-Fi' toggle to turn it on.
Touch and hold the Wi-Fi icon to open network settings.
Select your Wi-Fi network from the list.
Enter the password if prompted and tap 'Connect'.

question: How do I make a phone call?
answer: Use the built-in Phone app to dial numbers or call saved contacts.
steps: Tap the Phone app icon (usually a green phone receiver) on your home screen.
To dial a new number, tap the dialpad icon, enter the number, and tap the green call button.
To call a saved contact, tap the 'Contacts' tab, find the person, and tap their name or the call icon next to it.

question: How do I take a picture?
answer: Capture photos using your phone's Camera app.
steps: Open the Camera app from your home screen or app drawer.
Aim your phone at the subject.
Tap the screen to focus on a specific area if needed.
Tap the large circular shutter button at the bottom to take the picture.

question: How do I download a new app?
answer: You can find and install new applications from the Google Play Store.
steps: Open the 'Play Store' app on your device.
Tap the search bar at the top and type the name of the app you want.
Tap the search icon (magnifying glass) on your keyboard.
Find the correct app in the results and tap 'Install'.
Once installed, tap 'Open' to launch the app.

question: How do I turn on the flashlight?
answer: Most Android phones have a built-in flashlight that uses the camera's LED flash.
steps: Swipe down from the top of the screen to open the Quick Settings panel.
Look for the 'Flashlight' icon (it looks like a small torch).
Tap the icon to turn the flashlight on.
Tap it again to turn it off.

question: How do I set an alarm?
answer: Use the Clock app to set up daily or one-time alarms.
steps: Open the 'Clock' app.
Tap the 'Alarm' tab at the bottom.
Tap the '+' (plus) button to create a new alarm.
Set the desired time by scrolling the hours and minutes.
Choose which days you want it to repeat, if any.
Tap 'Save' or 'OK'.

question: How do I connect Bluetooth headphones?
answer: Pair your wireless headphones to your phone using Bluetooth settings.
steps: Put your Bluetooth headphones into 'pairing mode' (refer to their manual).
On your phone, swipe down to open the Quick Settings panel.
Touch and hold the Bluetooth icon to open settings.
Make sure Bluetooth is turned on.
Tap 'Pair new device'.
Select your headphones from the list of available devices.
